identity.name: @epdoc/type
identity.purpose: Foundational type guards, deep-copy utilities, JSON serialization with special type preservation, and dictionary helpers for TypeScript/Deno

quickStart.pattern: Import type guards for runtime checks or use _.deepCopy() for deep cloning with string replacement

exports.name: isString, isNumber, isBoolean, isDate, isArray, isDict
exports.description: Runtime type guard functions for type-safe checking
exports.whenToUse: Use instead of typeof/instanceof for consistent type narrowing

exports.name: _.deepCopy
exports.description: Deep clone with optional string substitution
exports.whenToUse: When you need to clone objects and substitute ${key} placeholders

exports.name: jsonSerialize / jsonDeserialize
exports.description: JSON serialization preserving Set, Map, RegExp, Uint8Array
exports.whenToUse: When you need to serialize/deserialize special types to JSON

exports.name: stripJsonComments
exports.description: Remove comments from JSONC files before parsing
exports.whenToUse: When parsing JSON files that may contain comments

exports.name: Dict / EmptyDict / EmptyObject
exports.description: Dictionary type aliases for cleaner type definitions
exports.whenToUse: Use Dict<T> instead of Record<string, T>

patterns.name: Type Guards
patterns.when: Need runtime type checking with TypeScript narrowing

patterns.name: Deep Copy with Substitution
patterns.when: Cloning config objects with variable substitution

patterns.name: Advanced Substitution with Dates
patterns.when: Need date formatting in string substitutions
